title: Claims Analyst
description: BlackRock is seeking a Claims Analyst to support client claims processing and dispute resolution. Work hybrid at our St. Louis office, managing client relationships and ensuring accurate claims resolution.
responsibilities: Process and review client claims submissions for eligibility and completeness
Investigate claims discrepancies and coordinate resolutions
Maintain detailed claims records and documentation
Communicate with clients regarding claim status and requirements
Assist with claims data analysis and reporting
Support compliance with industry standards and regulations

requirements.education: High School diploma or GED; Associate's degree preferred
skills: Understanding of asset management or financial services (preferred)
